title: 10 best herbal capsules for dry skin

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Aloe capsules helps with dry skin because they provide a concentrated dose of aloe vera's natural moisturizing properties. The gel-like substance within the capsule penetrates deep into the skin, locking in moisture and soothing dryness. As it works to hydrate the skin from the inside out, it also calms irritated skin and reduces inflammation. Regular use of herbal aloe capsules can lead to softer, smoother skin that is better equipped to handle environmental stressors and maintain its natural barrier function.
remedy_properties: Aloin: Aloe vera's laxative property, aloin, helps to cleanse the gut and eliminate toxins that can contribute to dry skin.

Vitamin E: Aloe vera is rich in vitamin E, an antioxidant that moisturizes and protects the skin from damage caused by free radicals, reducing the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles associated with dry skin.
Glucomannan: Glucomannan, a soluble fiber found in aloe vera, helps to lock in moisture and soothe dry, irritated skin by forming a protective barrier on the skin's surface.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Rich in vitamins, minerals, and amino acids, aloe leaves provide hydration and nourishment to soothe and calm dry skin.
Buds: Aloe buds contain high concentrations of aloin, a natural compound that helps to lock in moisture and protect the skin from further dryness.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality aloe vera leaves from organic plants and wash them thoroughly with cold water.
Dry the aloe vera leaves in a warm place or using a food dehydrator at 150°f for 6 hours.
Crush the dried aloe vera leaves into fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix 1 teaspoon of powdered aloe vera with 250ml of distilled water to create a gel-like consistency and allow it to steep for 2 hours.
Fill empty vegetable capsules with the aloe vera gel mixture and store them in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 6 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Stinging nettle capsules helps with dry skin because they contain anti-inflammatory compounds that soothe and calm irritated skin. The capsules also rich in antioxidants, which help to protect the skin from environmental stressors and damage caused by free radicals. Additionally, stinging nettle's ability to increase blood flow and improve circulation can help to nourish and moisturize dry skin, leaving it feeling softer, smoother, and more supple. Overall, herbal stinging nettle capsules provide a natural and effective solution for managing dry skin symptoms.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory effects: Stinging nettle capsules contain compounds that reduce inflammation, which can alleviate redness and irritation associated with dry skin, allowing for a more comfortable and healthy complexion.

Antioxidant activity: Nettle capsules are rich in antioxidants, which help neutralize free radicals that can cause oxidative stress and contribute to dry, dull-looking skin; by protecting the skin from damage, nettle may improve its overall health and appearance.

Hydrating and moisturizing properties: The bioactive compounds in stinging nettle capsules have been shown to enhance skin hydration and moisturization, helping to lock in moisture and reduce the appearance of dry, flaky skin.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, nettle roots are effective in soothing and moisturizing dry skin.
Leaves: High in vitamins A and E, nettle leaves provide essential nutrients for maintaining healthy, hydrated skin.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh stinging nettle leaves urtica dioica in early morning when dew is present at 10am.
Rinse the harvested nettles with filtered water and pat dry with clean towels immediately.
Dehydrate the rinsed nettle leaves using a food dehydrator on low heat for 6 hours slowly.
Grind the dried nettle leaves into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle carefully.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with 250-500mg of the powdered nettle leaf mixture and seal tightly instantly.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Comfrey capsules helps with dry skin because they are rich in allantoin, a powerful emollient that deeply nourishes and moisturizes the skin. As an herbal supplement, comfrey capsules contain a concentrated form of comfrey root extract, which has been used for centuries to soothe and repair dry, irritated skin. By taking these capsules regularly, you can help lock in moisture, reduce inflammation, and promote healthy skin cell growth, leaving your skin feeling soft, smooth, and supple once again.
remedy_properties: Allantoin content: Allantoin, a natural compound found in comfrey, helps to promote cell turnover and regeneration, which can aid in repairing dry, damaged skin by replacing dead skin cells with new ones.
Anti-inflammatory activity: Comfrey's anti-inflammatory properties can help reduce redness and irritation associated with dry skin, soothing and calming the skin while reducing inflammation.

Antioxidant properties: Comfrey's antioxidant compounds help protect the skin from environmental stressors and free radicals, which can cause premature aging and dryness, promoting a healthier and more resilient skin barrier.
remedy_parts: Roots: Comfrey roots have anti-inflammatory properties, making them effective in soothing and hydrating dry, irritated skin.
Rhizomes: The underground rhizomes of comfrey contain rosmarinic acid, which has been shown to improve skin elasticity and reduce wrinkle formation.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh comfrey leaves symphytum officinale in early morning or late afternoon for best potency and quality.
Rinse the harvested leaves with clean water to remove dirt dust and debris before drying.
Dry the cleaned comfrey leaves using a food dehydrator on low heat setting 65-70°f for 12 hours or until crispy.
Grind dried comfrey leaves into a fine powder using a spice grinder or coffee grinder for optimal extraction.
Fill empty capsules with 500mg of ground comfrey powder and store in a cool dry place for up to 6 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Wheat capsules helps with dry skin because they contain soothing and nourishing herbs that penetrate deep into the skin. The capsular form allows for efficient absorption of these beneficial compounds, which then work to lock in moisture and reduce inflammation. As a result, dry, itchy skin is gently calmed, and overall hydration is improved, leaving skin feeling soft, supple, and refreshed. Additionally, wheat capsules can also help to repair damaged skin cells, promoting a brighter and more youthful complexion.
remedy_properties: Avenanthramides: These polyphenolic compounds have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which help to soothe and calm irritated skin, reducing redness and inflammation associated with dry skin.
Fibers: The fiber content in herbal wheat capsules helps to lock in moisture and provide a protective barrier on the skin's surface, preventing water loss and keeping the skin hydrated.
Vitamin E: This antioxidant-rich vitamin has been shown to improve skin hydration, reduce fine lines and wrinkles, and protect against environmental stressors that can dry out the skin.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in saponins, which help to soothe and moisturize dry skin, promoting a healthy barrier function.
Seeds: Packed with omega-6 fatty acids and antioxidants, which nourish and protect the skin, reducing inflammation and irritation.
remedy_recipe: Measure out 200g of dried wheat grass powder and set it aside for future use.
Combine 100ml of boiling distilled water with 20g of dried chamomile flowers in a heat-resistant glass measuring cup.
Allow the mixture to steep for 15-20 minutes, then strain the liquid through a cheesecloth or fine-mesh sieve into a clean container.
Mix the strained liquid with the previously measured wheat grass powder in a small bowl, stirring until it forms a uniform paste.
Spoon the herb-infused paste into empty gelatin capsules and seal them tightly, storing any unused capsules in an airtight container.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Zucchini capsules helps with dry skin because they are rich in antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals that work together to nourish and moisturize the skin. The antioxidants in zucchini capsules help to protect the skin from environmental stressors and damage caused by free radicals, while the vitamins A, C, and E promote collagen production and improve skin elasticity. Additionally, the omega-3 fatty acids present in these capsules help to hydrate and soothe dry, irritated skin, leaving it feeling soft, supple, and refreshed.
remedy_properties: Hydroxytyrosol: This polyphenol antioxidant found in olive leaf extract has been shown to improve skin hydration and reduce inflammation, which can help alleviate symptoms of dry skin.

B vitamins: Certain B vitamins, such as biotin, nicotinic acid, and panthenol, play a crucial role in maintaining the integrity of skin cells and promoting healthy skin growth. Deficiencies in these vitamins may contribute to dry, flaky skin.

Squalane: Squalene is an antioxidant found naturally in olives and can be extracted from olive oil. It has been shown to improve skin hydration, reduce inflammation, and promote collagen production, all of which can help alleviate symptoms of dry skin.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, roots help soothe and calm dry skin.
Seeds: High in omega-3 fatty acids and essential amino acids, seeds provide intense moisturizing properties for dry skin.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh zucchini squash leaves at dawn and rinse them thoroughly under cold running water.
Combine the dried zucchini leaves with 20 grams of organic glycerin in a mortar and pestle for 15 minutes.
Add 10 grams of vitamin e oil and 5 grams of sweet almond oil to the mixture and stir until well combined.
Transfer the mixture to a gelatin capsule machine and fill capsules with the herbal blend within 30 seconds.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 6 months before consumption.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Olive capsules helps with dry skin because they contain potent antioxidants and essential fatty acids derived from herbal extracts. These nutrients deeply moisturize and nourish the skin, leaving it supple and hydrated. The capsules also help to lock in moisture, reducing the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles. Additionally, the antioxidants present in olive capsules protect the skin from environmental stressors and damage caused by free radicals, promoting a healthy and radiant complexion.
remedy_properties: Olive Squalene: Helps to hydrate and lock in moisture, reducing dryness and flakiness on the skin's surface.
Vitamin E: Acts as an antioxidant, protecting the skin from environmental stressors and damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to dryness and irritation.
Olive Polyphenols: Have anti-inflammatory properties that help soothe and calm irritated skin, reducing redness and discomfort associated with dry skin conditions.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, olive roots help soothe and calm dry skin.
Seeds: Olive seeds contain fatty acids and vitamins that nourish and hydrate dry skin, leaving it soft and supple.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh olive leaves olea europaea from your local farm or garden.
Dry the harvested olive leaves in a warm ventilated area for 7-10 days.
Grind dried olive leaves into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix 200mg of powdered olive leaf extract with 300mg of olive oil and 100mg of beeswax for encapsulation.
Fill capsules with the mixture and store them in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 6 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Rosemary capsules helps with dry skin because they contain antioxidants and essential fatty acids that nourish and moisturize the skin from within. The anti-inflammatory properties of rosemary also help to reduce redness and irritation, leaving the skin feeling soothed and comfortable. Additionally, rosemary's natural antibacterial properties can help to prevent infection and promote healthy skin cell growth, resulting in a radiant and glowing complexion.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Rosemary capsules contain antioxidants that help protect the skin from damage caused by free radicals, reducing inflammation and oxidative stress that can contribute to dryness and irritation.

Anti-inflammatory properties: The anti-inflammatory compounds in rosemary capsules, such as camphor and borneol, can help reduce redness, swelling, and itching associated with dry skin, promoting a more balanced and healthy complexion.

Emollient properties: Rosemary's emollient properties help to lock in moisture and soothe dry, irritated skin by forming a protective barrier on the skin's surface, reducing water loss and leaving the skin feeling soft and supple.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rosemary roots have anti-inflammatory properties that can help soothe and calm dry, irritated skin.
Barks: The barks of rosemary contain antioxidant compounds that can help protect the skin from environmental stressors and promote healthy skin cell growth.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh rosemary leaves in the morning for optimal potency and flavor.
Dry the rosemary leaves using air circulation or desiccant method within 24 hours.
Crush dried rosemary leaves into small particles to increase surface area for infusion.
Mix 1 part crushed rosemary with 5 parts vegetable glycerin or coconut oil in a clean glass jar.
Allow mixture to infuse for at least 2 weeks and then filter through cheesecloth before filling capsules.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Lemon balm capsules helps with dry skin because of its natural antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The herb's extracts work to soothe and calm irritated skin, reducing redness and itchiness associated with dryness. Additionally, lemon balm's moisturizing effects help to lock in moisture, leaving the skin feeling soft, supple, and hydrated. This makes it an effective natural remedy for dry skin conditions such as eczema and psoriasis, providing long-lasting relief and promoting overall skin health.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant Properties: Lemon balm's antioxidant compounds help protect the skin from damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to dryness and irritation.
Anti-inflammatory Properties: The anti-inflammatory compounds in lemon balm may help reduce inflammation and redness associated with dry skin, promoting a more comfortable and healthy complexion.

Antimicrobial Properties: Lemon balm's antimicrobial properties can help combat bacterial and fungal infections that can exacerbate dry skin conditions like eczema and acne, reducing the risk of further irritation.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, lemon balm roots help to soothe and moisturize dry skin.
Leaves: Packed with vitamin C and flavonoids, lemon balm leaves provide natural hydration and antioxidant protection for dry skin.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh melissa officinalis leaves and dry them properly using a food dehydrator or air circulation method.
Measure out 250 grams of dried lemon balm leaves and grind them into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix the powdered lemon balm with 500 milliliters of distilled water to create a decoction, allowing it to steep for 30 minutes before straining.
Sift the liquid decoction through a cheesecloth or fine-mesh sieve into a clean glass container, discarding the solids and retaining approximately 300 milliliters of liquid extract.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with 500 milligrams of the lemon balm extract and store them in an airtight container, ready for use within six months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Pot marigold capsules helps with dry skin because they contain a rich source of antioxidants, vitamins, and fatty acids that work wonders to nourish and moisturize the skin. The herbal extract is known to improve skin elasticity, reduce inflammation, and promote collagen production, all of which contribute to healthier-looking skin. Additionally, it can help to lock in moisture, leaving dry skin feeling soft, supple, and hydrated for an extended period.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Pot marigold contains flavonoids and phenolic acids that reduce inflammation, which helps to soothe and calm irritated dry skin.
Antioxidant properties: The antioxidants present in pot marigold capsules protect the skin from damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to dryness and irritation.
Emollient and moisturizing properties: Pot marigold contains beta-carotene and other carotenoids that help to lock in moisture, soften and calm dry skin, and improve its natural barrier function.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, the roots help soothe and moisturize dry skin.
Flowers: Packed with vitamins A and E, as well as fatty acids, the flowers nourish and regenerate dry skin cells.
remedy_recipe: Harvest dried calendula officinalis flowers from a trusted source or purchase them from a reputable supplier measuring.
Clean the dried calendula flowers by gently sifting through the material to remove any debris or contaminants then store.
Grind the clean dried calendula flowers into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle for approximately 10 minutes.
Mix the ground calendula powder with 500 milliliters of organic coconut oil in a heat-resistant glass bowl and let it simmer.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with a precise 250-milligram measurement of the infused oil mixture using a digital scale.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: St John's Wort capsules help with dry skin because they are rich in bioflavonoids, which have potent antioxidant properties. These compounds help to soothe and calm irritated skin, reducing inflammation and redness associated with dryness. The capsules also contain hypericin, a compound that has been shown to improve the skin's natural barrier function, allowing it to retain moisture more effectively and leaving the skin feeling softer and more supple. As a result, St John's Wort capsules can provide relief from dry, rough, and itchy skin, promoting healthier and more radiant-looking complexion.
remedy_properties: Hyperforin: Hyperforin has anti-inflammatory effects, which can help reduce redness and irritation associated with dry skin.
Hypericin: Hypericin has antioxidant properties, which can help protect the skin from environmental stressors and damage caused by free radicals, contributing to a reduction in dryness and flakiness.
Flavonoids: Flavonoids, such as quercetin and kaempferol, have soothing and calming effects on the skin, which can help reduce itching and discomfort associated with dry skin.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in flavonoids and saponins, which help soothe and moisturize dry skin.
Flowers: Containing hyperforin and hypericin, these active compounds have anti-inflammatory properties that aid in relieving dry skin symptoms.
remedy_recipe: Harvest and clean the dried hypericum perforatum flowers following proper herb harvesting guidelines.
Grind 250 grams of dried hypericum perforatum flowers into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle for 5 minutes.
Mix 10 grams of ground hypericum perforatum with 40 grams of tapioca starch and 20 grams of gelatin in a bowl for 30 seconds.
Add 100 milliliters of distilled water to the mixture and stir until it forms a smooth paste within 2 minutes.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with approximately 500 milligrams of the prepared powder mixture and seal tightly using a capsule filler machine or by hand for 10 minutes.

intro_desc: Herbal capsules for dry skin are natural supplements that help alleviate dry, itchy, and flaky skin conditions. They work by providing essential nutrients and antioxidants to the skin, promoting hydration and soothing irritation. The best herbal capsules for dry skin include Calendula officinalis, Glycyrrhiza glabra, Aloe barbadensis, Camellia sinensis, Urtica dioica, Aloe vera, Simmondsia chinensis, Curcuma longa, Symphytum officinale, and Melaleuca alternifolia. If left untreated, dry skin can lead to discomfort, pain, and emotional distress, making everyday activities like dressing, showering, and socializing increasingly difficult.
supplementary_best_treatment: The best way to treat dry skin with herbal capsules is by incorporating them into your daily routine as a supplement. Look for formulas containing herbs like Aloe Vera, Chamomile, and Marshmallow root, which have natural moisturizing properties. Take 2-3 capsules daily with water, ideally before meals. The gentle, soothing ingredients will help lock in moisture, reduce inflammation, and promote healthy skin barrier function, resulting in softer, smoother skin over time.
supplementary_causes: Ailments similar to dry skin that are treated with herbal capsules are conditions characterized by inflammation, irritation, and discomfort. Examples include eczema, psoriasis, and acne. Herbal capsules containing ingredients like aloe vera, tea tree oil, and chamomile may help soothe and calm these conditions, reducing redness, itching, and scaling. They may also address underlying issues such as stress and digestive imbalances that can contribute to skin problems.

remedies.remedy_desc: Calendula officinalis capsules helps with dry skin because of its rich antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's extract contains triterpenoids, flavonoids, and carotenoids, which work together to soothe and protect the skin. Calendula has been traditionally used to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and improve skin hydration. By reducing inflammation and promoting skin hydration, calendula capsules can help to alleviate dry skin symptoms, leaving the skin feeling softer, smoother, and more resilient. This natural remedy can provide relief and promote healthy skin.
remedy_constituents: Triterpene saponins: These help with dry skin by reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, which can aid in soothing and moisturizing dry, irritated skin.

Phenolic acids (such as chlorogenic and caffeic acids): These help with dry skin by exhibiting antioxidant properties that can protect the skin from damage caused by free radicals and promote the production of collagen, which can help to maintain skin elasticity.

Flavonoids (such as quercetin and kaempferol): These help with dry skin by possessing anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that can reduce inflammation, improve skin hydration, and protect the skin from environmental stressors.
remedy_parts: Flowers: The flowers are commonly used due to their high content of anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that help soothe and moisturize dry skin.
Leaves: The leaves are used for their emollient and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to hydrate and calm dry skin.
Roots: The roots are utilized for their ability to provide a rich source of nutrients and antioxidants, which aid in soothing and repairing dry skin.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 1-2 cups of fresh calendula officinalis flowers at peak bloom for optimal potency and quality.
Dry the flowers in a single layer at 30°c for 2-3 hours to prevent degradation and spoilage.
Grind the dried flowers into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle for easy encapsulation.
Mix 1 teaspoon of the powder with 1 tablespoon of gelatin or vegetarian capsule filler to create the capsule content.
Fill gelatin or vegetarian capsules using a capsule filler machine and store them in an airtight container.

remedies.remedy_desc: Glycyrrhiza glabra capsules helps with dry skin because they contain licorice root, a natural emollient that locks in moisture and soothes irritated skin. The anti-inflammatory properties in licorice root reduce redness and inflammation, making it an effective treatment for dry, itchy skin. Additionally, Glycyrrhiza glabra capsules promote skin elasticity and firmness, helping to improve the overall texture and appearance of the skin. This natural remedy can provide long-lasting hydration and relief from dry skin symptoms.
remedy_constituents: Glycyrrhizin: Helps to lock moisture in the skin, reducing dryness and inflammation.
Saponins: Soothe and protect the skin, reducing irritation and dryness caused by environmental factors.
Flavonoids: Act as antioxidants, helping to repair and protect the skin from damage, reducing dryness and promoting healthy skin barrier function.
remedy_parts: Roots: Roots are the primary source of glycyrrhizin, a compound that helps to lock in moisture and soothe dry skin.
Leaves: Leaves of Glycyrrhiza glabra contain flavonoids and phenolic acids that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which help to protect and moisturize dry skin.
Barks: Barks of Glycyrrhiza glabra contain saponins, which have emollient and moisturizing properties that help to soften and hydrate dry skin.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 30 grams of dried glycyrrhiza glabra roots from a reputable supplier.
Dry the roots further at 50°c for 3 hours in a vacuum oven.
Grind the dried roots into a fine powder using a high-speed grinder.
Mix 1000 mg of the powder with 1000 mg of a natural excipient in a clean environment.
Fill the powder mixture into 1000 mg capsules using a capsule filling machine.

remedies.remedy_desc: Aloe barbadensis capsules helps with dry skin because they contain the powerful and soothing gel of the aloe vera plant. This gel is rich in vitamins A, C, and E, as well as other essential nutrients that help to lock in moisture and calm dry, irritated skin. By taking aloe vera capsules, you can promote hydration and reduce inflammation, leaving your skin feeling smooth, soft, and refreshed. The gel's anti-inflammatory properties also help to repair and protect the skin, making it an effective natural remedy for dry skin.
remedy_constituents: Glucomannan: Helps to retain moisture in the skin, reducing dryness and improving skin elasticity.
Aloin: Exhibits anti-inflammatory properties, soothing and calming irritated skin, and reducing the appearance of dry patches.
Chrysophanic acid: Possesses emollient and moisturizing properties, effectively hydrating the skin and protecting it from dryness and irritation.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Aloe vera leaves are primarily used due to their high content of aloe vera gel, which is rich in vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants that help to soothe and moisturize dry skin.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 500g of aloe barbadensis leaves in the morning when the gel is at its highest concentration.
Cut the leaves into small pieces and extract the gel using a juicer or blender.
Mix the extracted gel with 50g of glycerin to enhance its moisturizing properties and improve capsule stability.
Fill 500 empty gelatin capsules with 500mg of the aloe barbadensis gel mixture per capsule.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container in a cool dark place for up to 2 years.

remedies.remedy_desc: Camellia sinensis capsules helps with dry skin because of its rich antioxidant and emollient properties. The tea plant extracts in these capsules provide a protective barrier on the skin's surface, locking in moisture and reducing water loss. Additionally, Camellia sinensis is known to stimulate blood flow and improve skin elasticity, allowing it to retain its natural hydration levels. This combination of benefits makes Camellia sinensis capsules an effective solution for soothing and nourishing dry, irritated skin. Regular use can lead to softer, smoother skin.
remedy_constituents: Catechins: These flavonoids help protect the skin from environmental stressors, promote collagen production, and improve skin elasticity, reducing the appearance of dry skin.
Theaflavins: These polyphenolic compounds exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which help soothe and calm dry, irritated skin, reducing inflammation and promoting skin health.

Gallic acid: This phenolic acid has antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which help protect the skin from damage caused by free radicals and reduce inflammation, contributing to healthier and more hydrated skin.
remedy_parts: Leaves: The leaves of Camellia sinensis are rich in antioxidants and fatty acids, which help to moisturize and protect dry skin.
Seeds: The seeds of Camellia sinensis are used to produce oils that are rich in essential fatty acids, which help to nourish and hydrate dry skin.
Buds: The buds of Camellia sinensis are rich in antioxidants and flavonoids, which help to soothe and protect dry skin from damage.
remedy_recipe: Harvest camellia sinensis leaves in the early morning for maximum antioxidant properties.
Dry the leaves in a low-temperature oven at 150°f for 2 hours to preserve nutrients.
Grind the dried leaves into a fine powder using a coffee grinder for 5 minutes.
Mix 1 teaspoon of powder with 1/2 teaspoon of gelatin and 1/4 teaspoon of water to create a mixture.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with the mixture and seal them immediately to preserve freshness.

remedies.remedy_desc: Urtica dioica capsules helps with dry skin because they contain the natural anti-inflammatory properties of nettle leaf, which soothe and calm irritated skin. The rich vitamins and minerals present in the capsules, such as vitamin C and vitamin E, help to moisturize and hydrate the skin from within. Additionally, the capsules' antioxidant properties help to protect the skin from environmental stressors, promoting a healthy and radiant complexion. Regular use can lead to softer, smoother, and more supple skin.
remedy_constituents: Amino acids: Amino acids, particularly those with anti-inflammatory properties, help to soothe and calm dry skin by reducing inflammation and promoting skin hydration.
Phenolic acids: Phenolic acids, such as ferulic acid, act as antioxidants and help to protect the skin from environmental stressors, reducing dryness and promoting skin elasticity.

Volatile oils (terpenes): Volatile oils, including terpenes like borneol and camphor, have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that help to reduce dry skin by preventing infections and promoting skin healing.
remedy_parts: Leaves: The leaves are rich in antioxidants and have anti-inflammatory properties, making them effective in soothing and moisturizing dry skin.
Roots: The roots of Urtica dioica contain allantoin, a compound that helps to lock in moisture and promote skin hydration, making them beneficial for dry skin.
Stems: The stems of the plant are also rich in antioxidants and contain compounds that help to repair and protect the skin, reducing the appearance of dryness and irritation.
remedy_recipe: Harvest urtica dioica leaves and stems in early morning when they are at their highest tannin content.
Dry the harvested plant material in a single layer at 35-40 degrees celsius for 12 hours.
Grind the dried urtica dioica into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle for 30 minutes.
Mix the urtica dioica powder with a binding agent such as gelatin at a ratio of 1:1 for 10 minutes.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with the powdered urtica dioica mixture using a small spoon and store in a cool dry place.

remedies.remedy_desc: Aloe vera capsules helps with dry skin because they provide essential nutrients and vitamins that help to lock in moisture and soothe dry, irritated skin. The capsules contain extracts of pure aloe vera gel, rich in vitamins A, C, and E, as well as minerals like calcium and potassium. These nutrients help to hydrate the skin from within, reducing the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles, and promoting a healthy, radiant complexion. Regular use can lead to soft, supple skin.
remedy_constituents: Glycoproteins: Help to lock in moisture and soothe dry skin by forming a protective barrier on the skin's surface.
Vitamins (especially Vitamin E): Act as antioxidants to neutralize free radicals that can cause skin cell damage, promoting healthier and more hydrated skin.
Amino acids (especially Alanine and Glutamic Acid): Help to repair and regenerate skin cells, reducing the appearance of fine lines and dryness.
remedy_parts: Leaves: The gel extracted from Aloe vera leaves is rich in nutrients and moisturizing properties, making it a popular ingredient in dry skin treatments.
Seeds: Aloe vera seeds are used to create oil, which is rich in antioxidants and fatty acids that help to soothe and hydrate dry skin.
Gel from Leaves: The gel extracted from the leaves of Aloe vera is the most commonly used part, as it's rich in vitamins, minerals, and amino acids that help to lock in moisture and calm dry skin.
remedy_recipe: Measure 100 grams of dried aloe vera powder and 50 grams of vegetable cellulose powder for gelatinous capsule shells.
Weigh out 5 grams of each herbal powder blend to be filled into the capsules.
Mix 5 grams of aloe vera powder with 5 grams of herbal powder blend in a clean glass bowl.
Fill each capsule shell with 0.5 grams of the aloe vera powder mixture using a powder filler.
Store the herbal aloe vera capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 2 years.

remedies.remedy_desc: Simmondsia chinensis capsules helps with dry skin because they are rich in antioxidants and essential fatty acids that deeply nourish and moisturize the skin. The capsules contain jojoba oil, which is easily absorbed and helps to lock in moisture, reducing dryness and flakiness. The antioxidants in Simmondsia chinensis capsules also help to protect the skin from environmental stressors and damage, promoting healthy and hydrated skin. Regular use can lead to softer, smoother, and more supple skin.
remedy_constituents: Fatty Acids: Help to moisturize and hydrate the skin, reducing dryness and inflammation.
Sterols (e.g., beta-sitosterol): Have anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe and protect dry, irritated skin.
Triterpenoids (e.g., simmondsin): Exert antioxidant effects, which can help to protect the skin from environmental stressors and promote healthy skin cell function.
remedy_parts: Seeds: They are used to make capsules for dry skin because they contain antioxidants and fatty acids that help to moisturize and nourish the skin.
Seeds oil: The oil extracted from the seeds is often used in skincare products to help lock in moisture and support the skin's natural barrier function.
Seeds extract: The extract from the seeds is used in capsules to provide anti-inflammatory and antioxidant benefits, helping to soothe and protect dry skin.
remedy_recipe: Weigh 200 grams of simmondsia chinensis seeds and dry them in a low-temperature oven for 2 hours at 40 degrees celsius.
Grind the dried simmondsia chinensis seeds into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix 50 grams of the simmondsia chinensis powder with 50 grams of starch and 20 grams of gelatin to create a uniform blend.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with 500 milligrams of the simmondsia chinensis powder blend using a capsule filling machine.
Store the herbal simmondsia chinensis capsules in an airtight container in a cool dry place for up to 2 years.

remedies.remedy_desc: Curcuma longa capsules helps with dry skin because of its potent anti-inflammatory properties and ability to boost the skin's natural barrier function. The active compound, curcumin, has been shown to improve skin hydration and elasticity by increasing the production of hyaluronic acid, a natural moisturizer. Additionally, curcuma longa capsules have antioxidant properties that help protect the skin from environmental stressors and damage caused by free radicals, promoting a healthier and more radiant complexion. Regular use can lead to softer, smoother skin.
remedy_constituents: Curcumin: This polyphenolic compound helps with dry skin by reducing inflammation and oxidative stress, which can contribute to skin dryness and irritation.
Ferulic acid: This phenolic acid has antioxidant properties that help protect the skin from damage caused by free radicals, promoting healthier and more hydrated skin.
Demethoxycurcumin (DMC): This curcuminoid has anti-inflammatory properties that can help soothe and calm dry, irritated skin, reducing redness and discomfort.
remedy_parts: Rhyzomes: Rhyzomes are used due to their high turmeric content, which has anti-inflammatory and moisturizing properties that help to soothe and hydrate dry skin.
Roots: Roots are used as they contain curcumin, a powerful antioxidant that helps to reduce inflammation, promote collagen production, and improve skin elasticity.
Leaves: Leaves are used due to their rich content of essential oils, including sesquiterpenes, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that help to calm and protect dry skin.
remedy_recipe: Grind 500 grams of dried curcuma longa rhizomes into a fine powder using a spice grinder for 5 minutes.
Mix 20 grams of the ground powder with 20 grams of gelatin and 20 grams of glycerin in a bowl.
Heat the mixture in a double boiler at 40 degrees celsius for 15 minutes while stirring occasionally.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with 300 milligrams of the hot mixture using a capsule filler.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 12 months.

remedies.remedy_desc: Symphytum officinale capsules helps with dry skin because they contain comfrey, a herb rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds. Comfrey's ability to stimulate collagen production and improve skin elasticity helps to reduce dryness and irritation. The herb's soothing properties also aid in calming and moisturizing the skin, promoting a healthy and balanced moisture barrier. Regular use of Symphytum officinale capsules can lead to smoother, more hydrated skin and a reduction in the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles.
remedy_constituents: Alkaloids: These compounds help to promote skin health by reducing inflammation and improving the skin's barrier function, thus reducing dryness and discomfort.

Flavonoids: Flavonoids in Symphytum officinale capsules have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to protect the skin from damage, promote collagen production, and improve skin elasticity, reducing the appearance of dry skin.
Tannins: Tannins in these capsules help to reduce inflammation and improve skin hydration by forming a protective barrier on the skin's surface, locking in moisture and reducing dryness.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Used for their mucilaginous properties to soothe and moisturize dry skin.
Roots: Used for their anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties to help repair and protect dry skin.
Flowers: Used for their anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties to promote skin health and hydration.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 25g of dried symphytum officinale root from a trusted supplier or your own garden.
Crush the root into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle within 5 minutes.
Mix 250mg of the powder with 250mg of a neutral-tasting excipient like tapioca starch in a bowl.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with the mixture using a small spoon within 10 minutes.
Label and store the capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 2 years.

remedies.remedy_desc: Melaleuca alternifolia capsules helps with dry skin because of its potent anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The capsules contain tea tree oil, which is rich in antioxidants and has been shown to soothe and calm dry, irritated skin. By reducing inflammation and fighting off bacteria that can exacerbate dry skin, Melaleuca alternifolia capsules provide long-lasting relief and promote healthy skin hydration. Regular use can also help to lock in moisture and leave skin feeling soft and supple.
remedy_constituents: Cineole: Helps to lock in moisture and reduce inflammation, making it beneficial for dry skin.
Linalool: Exhibits anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can soothe and calm dry, irritated skin.
Cymene: Possesses antimicrobial properties that help to prevent infections and promote a healthy skin environment, reducing dryness and discomfort.
remedy_parts: Leaves: They are used due to their high content of essential oils, particularly tea tree oil, which has antimicrobial properties beneficial for skin health.
Buds: They are used for their medicinal properties, particularly for their ability to soothe and calm dry skin.
Stems: They are used due to the presence of essential oils that help in reducing inflammation and promoting skin regeneration.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 200g of dried melaleuca alternifolia leaves and flowers from a trusted source at the right time.
Dry the leaves and flowers further in a low-temperature oven at 50°c for 2 hours.
Grind 100g of the dried material into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or spice mill.
Mix 5g of the powdered material with 95g of gelatin powder in a large bowl.
Fill 100 empty capsules with the gelatin mixture using a capsule filler and seal immediately.
